description: Desktop widget full-screen recreation with timer ecosystem, display picker, animated vinyl deck, and playback controls.

identity.typography: oversized white monospaced timer plus SF Pro controls

layout.top_left_chrome: x, clock, display, settings dots at 20pt/18pt
layout.timer: upper-left, large white countdown/time with separate top-right timer dots
layout.vinyl_deck: upper-right album art, black grooved record, and tonearm
layout.menus: native frosted popovers with intrinsic row height
layout.desktop_window_policy: pinned to one screen/Space, not draggable; front/back are the only desktop layer options

Desktop_Glass_Container.notes: Full-screen mauve gradient canvas with radial blooms.

Top_Left_Dots.notes: Top-left chrome includes close, timer toggle, display picker, and shared settings dots.

Custom_Timer_Module.notes: Countdown/time modes, top-right anchored timer popover, and focused editable countdown minutes are implemented; timer numerals hide while editing.

Display_Picker_Header.notes: Display picker popover includes Built-in Retina Display and SB220Q.

Vinyl_and_Groove_Animations.notes: Record spins slowly when playing, groove rings use layered dark/light rings, center artwork is larger, tonearm drops/lifts with spring animation, and tonearm color toggles on click.

Playback_Controls.notes: Bottom-left playback block matches title/subtitle/control/progress layout.

UI_Repositioning.notes: Timer dots separated from the time text; vinyl record moved higher and farther right.

Dynamic_Color_Extraction_Glass.notes: Desktop liquid glass uses the album-derived accent color as a subtle soft-light tint.

Sticky_Window_Engine.notes: Desktop widget cannot be dragged, does not join all Spaces, and supports only front/back desktop layer behavior.
